narrative.summary: Japanese-Italian concept at new boutique hotel Nomas; just opened, no Google rating yet but high-signal pedigree.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "A quaint space on bloor street, seamlessly blending the cafe and the bar. Great in the morning and even better at night. 10/10 would recommend"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Love the dashi olives and duck tataki! The Café turns into a vibey bar at night. Great intimate space to hangout with a couple friends. 👯‍♀️"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Nice latte, pastries from Noctua. A very chill environment, the booths are comfy. I'll return to try the cocktails!"
